raw: Each pass provides free admission for up to 6 on Boston By Foot's public walking tours. Please consult www.bostonbyfoot.org for tour details; pre-registration is required for all tours. Reserve this pass to receive discount code. Not valid on private tours, water-based tours, or the two annual celebration tours (Beacon Hill with a BOO! & Footloose on the Freedom Trail.) Currently there is no coupon to pick up for Boston by Foot.

source_phrases.restrictions.reservation_required: pre-registration is required for all tours
